violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by an air circulating fan. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. The fan was moved during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The Yukon 1-door reach-in was observed held at an ambient temperature of 56 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items within the unit were evaluated and moved to alternate refrigeration or voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store TCS food items within the unit until an ambient of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or less is maintained. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The Yukon 1-door reach-in located in the main kitchen area was observed unable to maintain an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or less and was not in good repair. Establishment is repair, replace, or remove unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/23/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ventilation grate above the juice dispenser has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024
